desc:
f21v 特征描述

茎与花：单茎直立。顶端及侧枝生有六个深蓝色球状花苞，花苞中心为深绿色，边缘长有放射状的细短尖刺。
叶片：生有四组深绿色、星形或放射状的裂叶，每组有六至七个尖锐的叶尖。
根部：浅色。典型的繁茂须根系，由主茎基部向下方呈扇形散开延伸。

Stem & Flowers: Single erect stem. Six deep-blue globular buds at the tip and side branches; centers are dark green with radiating short spikes around the edges.
Leaves: Four clusters of deep-green, star-shaped or radiate lobed leaves; each cluster features six to seven sharp points.
Roots: Pale-colored. A typical dense fibrous root system extending downward in a fan-like spread from the base of the stem.
